vesfjdk 148- m:Xos 149- osustq,yk (cksyhosfjvu x.kjkT;) 150- fo;ruke 151- ”kkfEc;k 152- f”kEckCos ¹iQk- la- 11(1)@2009&,lvkbZlh,yMhMhº jkt oqQekj xks;y] la;qDr lfpo uksV%&eq[; vf/lwpuk Hkkjr ds jkti=k] vklk/kj.k] Hkkx II] [k.M 3] mi[k.M (ii) vf/lwpuk la[;k dk-vk- 2745 (v)] rkjh[k 8 fnlEcj] 2011 esa izdkf'kr fd;k x;k FkkA MINISTRY OF COMMUNICATINS AND INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY (Department of Electronics and Information Technology) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 4th February, 2014 S.O. 307 (E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by section 93 of the Semiconductor Intergrated Circuits Layout-Design Act, 2000 (37 of 2000), and in supersession of the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Communications and Information Technology (Department of Electronics and Information Technology) vide number S.O. 2745 (E), dated the 2nd December, 2011 published in the Gazette of Inida dated 8th December, 2011, the Central Government hereby declares the following countries as convention countries with effect from the date of publication of this notification in the Official Gazette for the purposes of the provisions of the said Act, namely:— Sl. No. Name of the Country 1. Albania 2. Angola 3. Antigua and Barbuda 4. Argentina 5. Armenia 6. Australia 7. Austria 8. Bahrain, Kingdom of 9. Bangladesh 10. Barbados 11. Belgium 12. Belize 13.
